Notice Of Hearing On Petition Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029.600
Off Calendar Dec-06-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PETITIONER KRYSTAL STEVENS INDIVIDUALLY AND AS REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF ELIJAH ALEXANDER AULD, DECEASED, JOHN AULD, JOSEPH STEVENS' Petition Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029.600.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jarom Tefteller, Esq., of Tefteller Law, PLLC, (903) 843-5678, for Petitioners.
Katherine Compton, Esq., of Steptoe & Johnson, PLLC, (214) 251-8005, for Interested Party.

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff-Intervenors' Petition Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029.600 is GRANTED. Movant Technologies, Inc. ("Movant") is ordered to comply with the subpoena and produce all responsive documents. The record supports issuance of the order. Defendant PalletOne of Texas, L.P.'s objections are overruled. The objections are untimely. Moreover, the application is the operative pleading in this proceeding and a proof of service of summons is on file. This court has jurisdiction over Plaintiff-Intervenors' California subpoena served upon Movant. No other court first exercised proper jurisdiction over this subpoena. The period covered by Plaintiff-Intervenors' request is reasonable. The requests are not unduly burdensome. PalletOne's response to a similar discovery request from other Plaintiffs does not render this request-addressed to a different party-improper, unreasonable or undue.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Court Reporter: Ryan Wheeler; CSR: 13717; T: 760.805.3974. (302/JMQ)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

Casey Kaufman, Esq., KAUFMAN LAW (510) 900-6399 casey@caseykaufmanlaw.com for Petitioners Krystal Michelle Stevens, et al

Counsel for Interested Party, Palletone of Texas, L.P. states to the Court that an opposition to the petition was filed. Palletone's untimely opposition was e-filed on 11/4/25, but processed by the e-filing clerk on 11/14/24. Counsel request a continuance to allow parties' opposition to be considered.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. After discussion, the Court vacates it tentative ruling and rules as follows:

PETITIONER KRYSTAL STEVENS INDIVIDUALLY AND AS REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF ELIJAH ALEXANDER AULD, DECEASED, JOHN AULD, JOSEPH STEVENS' Notice Of Hearing On Petition Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure 2029.600 is continued to December 6, 2024 at 9:30 a.m. Law & Motion.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RCE)
